name: sonar-test-node
description: sonar testing for web development fundamentals

scripts.validate-ci: npm run validate-html && npm run validate-sonar-ci
scripts.validate-local-mac: npm run validate-html && npm run validate-sonar-local-mac
scripts.validate-local-win: npm run validate-html && npm run validate-sonar-local-win
scripts.validate-wdf-local-step1: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.validate-wdf-local-mac: npm run validate-wdf-local-step1 && npm run validate-wdf-local-step2 && npm run validate-sonar-local-mac
scripts.validate-wdf-local-win: npm run validate-wdf-local-step1 && npm run validate-wdf-local-step2 && npm run validate-sonar-local-win
